title: Game Streamer
author: bstrana
description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
changelog: Fix agent switching: pendingCommand filtered server-side per agent so OBS never intercepts Pi4-targeted commands — switching between OBS and Pi4 now works without updating the OBS Lua script.
